design_philosophy: Objective, function-first, and highly structured. The UI acts as a 'Control Room' for enterprise goal tracking. 95% of the UI is monochrome, utilizing spacing and typographic hierarchy over decorative elements. Color is reserved strictly for functionality (status, actions, heatmaps).

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Control Room Grid. Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).
spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous container padding (p-6 or p-8). Internal component padding compact (p-4) to maintain data density.
spacing_and_layout.borders_and_radius: Max border-radius is 6px (rounded-md). Emphasize sharp, clean edges.
spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Flat surfaces with 1px border (border-[#E5E7EB]). Absolutely NO soft drop shadows. Use optical alignment for icons/text.

components.buttons: Flat solid background. Primary: bg-[#0038FF] text-white hover:bg-[#002ED6]. Secondary: bg-white border border-[#E5E7EB] hover:bg-[#F3F4F6].
components.forms: Use Shadcn components heavily customized to be flat. 1px solid borders, square/slightly rounded corners. Focus state must use ring-1 ring-[#0038FF].
components.tables: Dense layout. py-2 px-3 cells. Sticky headers with uppercase tiny labels. Zebra striping or subtle hover (hover:bg-[#F9FAFB]) for readability.
components.cards: Cardless style preferred. If using cards, apply border border-[#E5E7EB] bg-white and no shadow.
components.charts: Recharts. Use functional colors or brand primary. Clean tooltips with bold metrics.
components.heatmap: CSS Grid based square cells representing QoQ check-in completion. Color mapped to heatmap_scale.
components.navigation: Fixed left sidebar. Clean, monochrome, icon + text. Active state highlighted with bg-[#F3F4F6] and strong text-primary.

interactive_and_motion.hover_states: Explicit color shifts (backgrounds or borders). No floating/translating on hover to maintain structural solidity.
interactive_and_motion.transitions: Fast and snappy: transition-all duration-150 ease-in-out.
interactive_and_motion.accessibility: Focus rings must be high contrast. Support prefers-reduced-motion.

icons_and_assets.logo_concept: Text 'AtomQuest' in Chivo Black + standard lucide target/hexagon icon.

login_background.description: Abstract corporate architecture to be used on the login page as a background with a dark overlay.

pages.login: 2-column split. Left: Auth form with Role Switcher (Employee/Manager/Admin). Right: Full height login_background with overlay.
pages.dashboard_layout: Persistent left sidebar with navigation. Top header with context (User profile, quick actions). Main content area.
pages.goal_creation: Step-by-step or structured long form. Fields: Thrust Area, Goal Title, Target, Weightage, UoM (numeric/percentage/timeline/zero-based).
pages.manager_approval: Table view of pending goals. Clicking a row opens a slide-over/drawer or inline editor to approve/reject with comments.
pages.check_in: Interface showing goal progress. Form inputs for Q1-Q4 values. Visual progress bar calculating QoQ trend vs target.
pages.analytics: Dashboard containing Recharts (bar/line) for organization-wide progress, a Team Progress Heatmap, and an Achievement Reports Table.
pages.audit_trail: A timeline or table view tracking all state changes (Created, Approved, Checked-in) with timestamps and users.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-btn', data-testid='approve-goal-btn').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text contrast must meet at least 4.5:1. Use white text on primary button.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement this dashboard using purely .js files (no .tsx). Utilize HTML+Tailwind for layouts and customize Shadcn components to follow the flat, high-contrast, border-heavy aesthetic. Do not use generic fonts for headings—import Chivo and IBM Plex Sans. Ensure every actionable element has a data-testid attribute. Do not invent unapproved colors. Build the Heatmap using standard grid layouts.
